title: ida linguella
intro: Ida linguella, also known as Indian mulberry or country mallow, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ida linguella include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Ida linguella can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
